name: Quick Open Reverse
notes:
Curve the step. Connect R shoulder down to R hip (turning the dial). Preparing for L turn (Lady is inside of turn): Lower part of body is rotary, upper body is on sway plane. For left turning figures, upper body turns less. L shoulder positive.
Keep left side strongly to the Man all through the steps.
The movement is still same direction back, foot is pointing LOD.
Swing L hip and L side through an upward diagonal (push from the R hip), do not put head weight forward too quickly. Feel the lightness. Body stretched.
Changing from L side positive to R side positive.
Feather ending.
Lengthen the R side. Take head to L. Turn the feet. Giving/keeping upper body and arms to partner.
Body position is strongly to the right, head balance on the left.

steps.action: Forward in line of dance, beginning turn to left
Step to side, backing diagonal wall
